block_01: The Envelopes indicator can be a great and simplified alternative to Bollinger Bands. It displays the overbought and oversold levels and allows a trader to find entry points and spot price reversals quickly.
block_02: It uses three Moving Averages with two of them equally distanced to the up and down sides of the current price to form support and resistance levels. The middle Moving Average follows the trend and its movement is the key to understanding this indicator’s signals.
block_03: Check out the full article to learn to apply this indicator in your daily trading
